name: Southwestern Grilled Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves (1 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat coals or gas grill. Cover and grill chicken 5 to 6 inches from medium heat for 15 to 20 minutes, turning once, until juice of the thickest pieces is no longer pink.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover and refrigerate chicken at least 1 hour until chilled.
3. Cut each chicken breast half into slices. Mix dressing, cilantro, and chilies in a bowl.
4. Place 2 cups romaine lettuce on each of 4 serving plates. Top with bell pepper slices and 1 sliced chicken breast half.
5. Serve with the dressing mixture.
